_comment: Topics DELIBERATELY absent from the knowledge base, so refusal eval cases have something to point at. The knowledge agent must say no article covers these and offer a ticket (ADR-011) rather than improvise. Data generation must NOT create an article matching any of these.

example_queries: how do I pair my Bluetooth keyboard
my wireless keyboard won't connect over bluetooth
missing_topics.note: Hardware KB covers WIRED keyboard/mouse and docks only; Bluetooth pairing is intentionally uncovered.

example_queries: how to fix error E-505 on the printer
missing_topics.note: Printer KB covers adding a network printer and generic 'not printing' steps, never the specific E-505 driver code.

missing_topics.topic: Setting up work email on a smartwatch
example_queries: set up my work email on my smartwatch
missing_topics.note: Email KB covers desktop and phone only.
Not in the software catalog or KB; a plausible-but-absent SaaS request.

example_queries: how do I get a parking badge
request access to the parking garage
missing_topics.note: Out of IT scope entirely — tests that the agent refuses non-IT questions too.
